## Summary

One or two sentences on what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` - new user-visible feature
- [ ] `fix` - bug fix
- [ ] `docs` - docs-only
- [ ] `chore` - tooling, refactor, no behaviour change
- [ ] `test` - tests-only
- [ ] `sec` - security hardening
- [ ] `ops` - infra / CI
- [ ] `a11y` - accessibility
- [ ] `i18n` - localisation

## Linked issues

Closes #

## What changed

- Bullet list of the main changes
- Keep it scannable; reviewers will look at the diff for detail

## Screenshots / recordings

If the change affects UI, attach before/after. For E2E behaviour,
attach a short clip or describe the new flow.

## Testing

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npx playwright test` passes locally (or CI green)
- [ ] New behaviour covered by a unit or E2E test
- [ ] Manually verified in at least one browser (which?):

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] Conventional Commits format used for commit messages
- [ ] Docs updated where behaviour changes (README, runbook, in-code
      comments)
- [ ] No new lint or coverage regressions
- [ ] If touching privacy / security / scoring rules: PI or DPO pinged
- [ ] If touching a clinical scenario: clinical reviewer pinged

## Notes for the reviewer

Anything to look at first, known limitations, follow-up PRs planned.
